# HLTHvrs (HealthVerse)

> HLTHvrs (HealthVerse) is an AI-driven, HIPAA-compliant marketing intelligence platform built for mental health and behavioral health providers. It serves as a command center for patient acquisition — from campaign creation and multi-channel deployment to appointment-level ROI tracking. Built by 1ness Strategies (1nessAgency) in New York City.
>
> Founded by James Tannahill, President of Plocamium Holdings and Co-Founder of 1nessAgency.
>
> Contact: hello@1nessagency.com
> Location: New York, NY 10036
> Last reviewed: 2026-02-28

For comprehensive LLM guidance including entity data, citable facts, and access
policies, see the full file:
[Full LLM Guidance](https://hlthvrs.com/llms-full.txt)

## About

- [Home](https://hlthvrs.com/): Platform overview and value proposition
- [Features](https://hlthvrs.com/features): Six core capabilities — Clients, Budgets, Creative, Campaigns, Social, Reports
- [Pricing](https://hlthvrs.com/pricing): Four tiers from solo practitioners to enterprise

## Platform Features

- Clients: Manage clinic accounts, contacts, and campaigns from one view
- Budgets: Set, track, and reallocate ad spend across channels in real time
- Creative: Build HIPAA-safe ad creative with templates and approval workflows
- Campaigns: Launch and monitor Google, Meta, and directory campaigns in one place
- Social: Schedule and publish across social channels without leaving the platform
- Reports: Attribution tracking by campaign tied to booked appointments, not vanity metrics

## Target Audience

- Solo psychiatric practitioners
- Therapists and wellness clinics
- Multi-provider behavioral health practices
- Healthcare marketing agencies
- Clinical groups seeking patient acquisition tools

## Pricing

- Align: $295/month — HIPAA-compliant intake dashboard, essential lead capture, limited reporting
- Engage: $695/month — Lead source attribution, full Google & Meta Ads integration, campaign tracking
- Elevate: $1,495/month — ROI tracking by campaign, EHR & CRM integration, advanced analytics
- Thrive: $2,495/month — Full data analytics suite, end-to-end patient funnel automation, strategic growth support
- All tiers: complimentary first month, 20% savings on annual billing

## Integrations

- Google Ads
- Meta (Facebook/Instagram)
- Healthcare directories
- EHR/CRM systems (Elevate tier and above)

## Key Differentiators

- HIPAA-compliant by design — not retrofitted
- Measures booked evaluations and appointments, not clicks
- Built specifically for behavioral health and psychiatric practices
- Consolidates campaigns, creative, social, and reporting in one platform

## Parent Company

- [1nessAgency](https://www.1nessagency.com/): Compliance-focused digital marketing agency — Google Premier Partner, LegitScript Certified

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://hlthvrs.com/privacy): Data handling and HIPAA compliance
- [Terms of Service](https://hlthvrs.com/terms): Platform usage terms

- [Get Started](https://hlthvrs.com/pricing): Start with a free 30-day trial
